name: ux
displayName: UX — the design intelligence plugin for Claude Code
description: Design intelligence engine for AI coding. v2 ships a Python-backed reasoning core: 5-parallel-search recommender, 75+ styles, 170+ palettes, 65+ type pairs, 120+ components, 170+ industry rules, 110+ named UX laws, 50+ motion presets, 30+ regex anti-patterns, 72 real brand specs (Apple, Stripe, Linear, Figma, Tesla, Notion, Spotify, BMW). Plus the 18 slash commands and 5 sub-agents from v1. Cross-IDE via pip/npx — runs in 17 environments including Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Gemini CLI, Codex, Cline, Continue, Aider, Zed. Anti-AI-slop by default.
